calendar.matters:
Request For Withdraw Of Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Request for Withrawal of Funds from Blocked Account by the beneficiary Hani F. Swalim.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.

Hani F. Swalim was present in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Request is GRANTED. Given that the beneficiary, Hani F. Swalim who was then a minor has attained the age of 18 years, the following amount may be disbursed:

Balance of Trust Account - $280,638.21.

Taliah Swalim in Trust For Hani F. Swalim
Wells Fargo Bank
Bush-Divisadero, San Francisco, CA
Account Number: 1012065694-000

The Proposed Order for Withdrawal of Funds from Blocked Account was submitted to and signed by the Court.
